official_public_docs_or_observed_endpoin: Observed HiBob careers board plus job-ad API.
source_discovery_method: parse supported *.careers.hibob.com public board URLs and build same-origin /api/job-ad endpoint
list_fetch_method: source-local board GET followed by same-origin job-ad API GET with final-host guards
detail_fetch_method: not enabled; saved fixture covers list/API payload fields only
pagination_method: no pagination proven in saved fixture; keep bounded single API response until a source variant proves pagination
canonical_url_rule: prefer jobUrl/absoluteUrl/url from jobAdDetails; otherwise rebuild same-origin /job/{id} URL
title_company_rule: reject rows missing title, company context, or usable canonical/apply URL; reject placeholders and blank titles
location_text_rule: use jobAdDetails[].site first, then jobAdDetails[].country; leave blank when source omits both
country_region_city_rule: normalize country from jobAdDetails[].country/site and city from a concrete site first segment; do not publish country-only values as city
remote_type_rule: remote/hybrid remains source-absent unless exact source fields appear; geo-backed rows normalize as onsite through source-location evidence
posting_date_rule: use jobAdDetails[].publishedAt only; leave null when source omits it
rate_limit: strict host serialization, jitter, retry cap, and high block-rate stop

quality_threshold.public_write_rule: source canary only; public writes require raw parser fixture, expected normalized fixture, and passing parser tests

quarantine_reason: hold/quarantine recommendation: disabled/collect-when-disabled off until bounded live canary proves source quality

runner_interface.normalize: server/ingestion/parserContract.js normalized posting shape plus source-specific normalizer
runner_interface.writeAccepted: source runner accepted path updates public read model only after validation
runner_interface.writeQuarantine: source runner quarantine path records reason and keeps row out of public index

next_action: keep disabled until bounded live canary and source quality evidence are approved
certification_blockers: live canary/source quality evidence pending; no production source apply has been run
